instruction: Help me format column "spent" by keeping two decimal points.

evaluator.eval: compare_table(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': ['/home/user/Keep_Two_decimal_points.xlsx', '/home/user/Keep_Two_decimal_points-Sheet1.csv'], 'dest': ['Keep_Two_decimal_points.xlsx', 'Keep_Two_decimal_points-Sheet1.csv'], 'multi': True}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': ['https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_calc/6e99a1ad-07d2-4b66-a1ce-ece6d99c20a5/Keep_Two_decimal_points_gold.xlsx', 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_calc/6e99a1ad-07d2-4b66-a1ce-ece6d99c20a5/Keep_Two_decimal_points_gold-Sheet1.csv'], 'dest': ['Keep_Two_decimal_points_gold.xlsx', 'Keep_Two_decimal_points_gold-Sheet1.csv'], 'multi': True}), rules=[{'type': 'sheet_print', 'sheet_idx0': 'RNSheet1', 'sheet_idx1': 'ENSheet1'}])
